requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters in Gambia Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——冈比亚项目中光伏逆变器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——甘比亞項目中光伏逆變器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: No standalone TGSB or PURA EMC technical regulation specifically for solar PV inverters has been identified from public sources. The practical EMC baseline for grid-tied, donor-financed, or professionally procured PV inverters should therefore be taken from IEC standards and project specifications: IEC 62920 for EMC requirements and test methods for PV power conversion equipment, plus applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emission tests. TGSB is The Gambia's standards body and has product certification and conformity functions; PURA regulates electricity and renewable-energy activity. Exporters should confirm whether TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, the EPC contractor, or the donor/lender requires IEC EMC test reports for the exact inverter model.
summary.zh: 公开来源中尚未识别出TGSB或PURA专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC技术法规。因此，并网、捐助方融资或专业采购的光伏逆变器实际EMC基线应来自IEC标准和项目规格：IEC 62920用于光伏功率变换设备的EMC要求和测试方法，并结合适用的IEC 61000系列谐波、闪烁、抗扰度和发射测试。TGSB是冈比亚标准机构，具有产品认证和合格评定职能；PURA监管电力和可再生能源活动。出口商应确认TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、EPC承包商或捐助方/贷款方是否要求针对具体逆变器型号的IEC EMC测试报告。
summary.zht: 公開來源中尚未識別出TGSB或PURA專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC技術法規。因此，併網、捐助方融資或專業採購的光伏逆變器實際EMC基線應來自IEC標準和項目規格：IEC 62920用於光伏功率轉換設備的EMC要求和測試方法，並結合適用的IEC 61000系列諧波、閃爍、抗擾度和發射測試。TGSB是甘比亞標準機構，具有產品認證和合格評定職能；PURA監管電力和再生能源活動。出口商應確認TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、EPC承包商或捐助方/貸款方是否要求針對具體逆變器型號的IEC EMC測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 — Flicker and harmonic limits where applicable by rating
TGSB product certification and conformity context
PURA electricity and renewable-energy regulatory context

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly tied to GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CNAS laboratory reports, and supplier declarations. These reports can demonstrate domestic China performance, but they may not be written to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000 test configuration requested by a Gambian project owner, utility engineer, donor, or lender.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常与GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CNAS实验室报告和供应商声明相关。这些报告可以证明中国国内性能，但可能不是按照冈比亚项目业主、公用事业工程师、捐助方或贷款方要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000测试配置出具。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常與GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CNAS實驗室報告和供應商聲明相關。這些報告可以證明中國國內性能，但可能不是按照甘比亞項目業主、公用事業工程師、捐助方或貸款方要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000測試配置出具。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports should be mapped line by line to IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 clauses before relying on them. Where the report does not show IEC method, rating, port configuration, grid voltage, firmware version, cable arrangement, or pass/fail limits, obtain a supplementary IEC EMC report from an accredited laboratory for the exact model or family.
gap.zh: 差距：在依赖中国GB/T EMC报告前，应逐条映射至IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000条款。若报告未显示IEC方法、额定值、端口配置、电网电压、固件版本、电缆布置或合格/不合格限值，应为具体型号或系列从认可实验室取得补充IEC EMC报告。
gap.zht: 差距：在依賴中國GB/T EMC報告前，應逐條映射至IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000條款。若報告未顯示IEC方法、額定值、端口配置、電網電壓、韌體版本、電纜布置或合格/不合格限值，應為具體型號或系列從認可實驗室取得補充IEC EMC報告。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; likely mandatory when required by TGSB conformity review, PURA or NAWEC technical review, EPC specifications, or donor/lender procurement documents
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence supports domestic certification or supplier qualification but is not automatically a Gambia project acceptance document

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No public Gambia-only solar-inverter EMC rule was confirmed. Use IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports as the conservative evidence package, and confirm with TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, the EPC contractor, and any donor or lender before assuming Chinese GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence is sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尚未确认公开的冈比亚专用太阳能逆变器EMC规则。保守证据包应采用IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000报告，并在假定中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC证据足够前，向TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、EPC承包商以及任何捐助方或贷款方确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚未確認公開的甘比亞專用太陽能逆變器EMC規則。保守證據包應採用IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000報告，並在假定中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC證據足夠前，向TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、EPC承包商以及任何捐助方或貸款方確認。
